subject: feat(ui): add import format guide and sample CSV to burger menu
body:
New menu items below a divider:
- "Import Format" — explains required columns, date formats, amount
  handling, and includes a copy-pasteable AI prompt for converting
  bank statements into the right CSV structure.
- "Sample CSV" — 25-row realistic sample file rendered in a code block
  for easy copying/testing.

Both use the existing HelpDrawer + Vite ?raw pattern.

Tags: ui, import, docs, menu, help
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: help-system
Semver: minor

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Cz1AZhnaVwR4Q127NSDgQs
title: add import format guide and sample CSV to burger menu
